message:
fix(cx): include identifier in third-party macaroon caveat chain bytes

The chain_bytes computation for third-party caveats was hashing only the
VID (verification-identifier) when deriving the binding key. Per the
macaroon specification, the correct derivation must hash vid || identifier
to ensure the caveat is cryptographically bound to its target service.

Patched all three sites (chain_bytes, add_third_party_caveat, verify)
consistently so that verification of discharge macaroons with third-party
caveat chains now succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
